content: What is the vehicle or rig identifier?
vehicle: Unit 4012, odometer start: 45678, fuel level: full, equipment and narcotics check status: all good, notes: PPE stocked and radio OK

Logged for Form 3:
- Unit: 4012
- Odometer start: 45,678
- Fuel: Full
- Equipment check: GOOD
- Narcotics check: GOOD
- Notes: PPE stocked; radio OK
- Issues: 0

Next required to continue:
1) Date and shift start time
2) Crew names and roles (Lead/Attendant/Driver)
3) Station/base post
4) O2 pressures (main and portable) and suction check result
5) Monitor/defib self-test result and stretcher/cot check
6) Narcotics seal numbers and witness (if required)
7) Any pre-existing vehicle damage or missing items?

What is the vehicle or rig identifier?
vehicle: Unit 4012, odometer start: 45678, fuel level: full, equipment and narcotics check status: all good, notes: PPE stocked and radio OK

Form 3 – Shift Start recorded.
- Vehicle: Unit 4012
- Odometer start: 45,678
- Fuel: Full
- Equipment check: All good
- Narcotics check: All good
- Notes: PPE stocked; radio OK
- Issues: 0

Provide the following to complete start-of-shift:
- Shift start date/time and station/post
- Crew names and certs
- Oxygen levels (main and portable) + seal numbers
- Monitor/defib self-test result and supplies (pads, cables)
- Suction (onboard and portable) status
- Cot/stretcher and stair chair status
- Lights/sirens and MDT/tablet status
- Narcotics seal numbers
- Vehicle cleanliness/damage
- Any restock requests

We’ll capture odometer end and fuel at end-of-shift.
I’m here and ready to help. What would you like me to confirm?
